revision.comment: move subbox and new 3cols version to templatestyles as the beginning of the end for infobox styles (still have to clean up all the infobox uses in the wild
Protected "[[Module:Infobox/styles.css]]": match parent ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
add a stronger note
move navbar styling here
Fix [[phab:T281642]], a pet peeve of mine. This copies across styles from [[MediaWiki:Minerva.css]]
Apply night theme to infobox full data so links are accessible
Add some example pages and slightly darken background
.... and of course color-base is needed.
Use div so this doesn't apply to
Restrict to elements not tagged notheme to allow templates to override
Applies fix for [[File:Broken_infobox_of_Chris_Dangerfield_2024-06-13.png]]
Drop parser output and add media query. Follow up to previous edit.
Rollback. This has unexpected consequences on other pages e.g. [[Spain]]
Add infobox-table class to markup infoboxes that rely on the table tag that is associated with infoboxes.
Reduce padding, to reduce overall size of infobox-table elements
Limit the !important's to inline style override
Use display table-caption for captions
For completeness.. use table-row-group for tbody element
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Infobox/styles.css]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
Fixes [[phab:T369874]] via automated script
no reason for that
remove this block entirely, common.css and minerva.css have the relevant styles

remove .infobox-table tr rule per [[Template talk:Infobox#Display for table rows]]
per talk page

fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value. background-color: transparent is generally not advised, but if it is necessary, it needs color:inherit.
attempting to resolve a nesting issue.
